title: Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary is located at Niphad Tehsil of Nashik District, known as the Bharatpur of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary is located at Niphad Tehsil of Nashik District, known as the Bharatpur of Maharashtra. It is designated as Ramsar site and it's a Maharashtra's first Ramsar site. A stone pickup is constructed across river Godavari at Nandur Madhmeshwar. This resulted into the formation of rich environment for biological diversity.

topPlaces.name: Banganga River (Maharashtra)
topPlaces.description: Banganga is a small tributary of the Godavari River in the Nashik district, in the state of Maharashtra in western India. The Banganga rises a little to the north-west of Ramsej hill and flows in a general easterly course, passing by Ozar, where a dam crosses it to divert the water into canals on both sides for irrigation.

topPlaces.name: Datyane
topPlaces.description: Datyane is a village in the Niphad taluka, Nashik district of Maharashtra, India, situated on the river Banganga and on the Ozar-Kasabe Sukena connecting road.

items.note: Banganga is a small tributary of the Godavari River in the Nashik district, in the state of Maharashtra in western India. The Banganga rises a little to the north-west of Ramsej hill and flows in a general easterly course, passing by Ozar, where a dam crosses it to divert the water into canals on both sides for irrigation.
Datyane is a village in the Niphad taluka, Nashik district of Maharashtra, India, situated on the river Banganga and on the Ozar-Kasabe Sukena connecting road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (53 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (19 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nandur Madhmeshwar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Banganga River (Maharashtra), Datyane.
